title: Equip Item
description: The entity puts on the desired equipment.

excluded_items.title: Excluded Items
excluded_items.description:
List of items that the entity should not equip.

Properties:
• item (string)

Sample values:
• bogged: [{"item":"minecraft:banner:15"}]

can_wear_armor.title: Can Wear Armor
can_wear_armor.description: If true, the entity can pick up and wear armor items from the ground.
